title: Application
full_text:
7.1.1.2 Application
Application
1) This Part applies to the electrical power systems and motors that are connected
to the building's electrical service. (See Note A-7.1.1.2.(1).)

sentences.text: This Part applies to the electrical power systems and motors that are connected to the building's electrical service. (See Note A-7.1.1.2.(1).)
